message:
feat(core,fuse,harness): enable fuser ABI 7-31, fix remove_entry write target, add truncate+fallocate tests

- Cargo.toml: enable fuser "abi-7-31" feature to support fallocate and
  other newer FUSE operations
- ffs-core/lib.rs: fix remove_entry to write through tx_dev (MVCC
  transaction device) instead of block_dev, ensuring directory entry
  removal is captured in the transaction log
- ffs-core/lib.rs: add diagnostic debug logging when lookup_name fails
  during unlink, printing parent extents and block contents
- ffs-core/lib.rs: improve btrfs fallocate test panic message to include
  raw buffer contents for easier debugging
- ffs-core/lib.rs: add test btrfs_write_truncate_partial_then_append
  verifying that truncate+append does not resurrect stale tail data
- ffs-core/lib.rs: add test btrfs_write_fallocate_overlapping_existing
  verifying prealloc over live data does not clobber written content
- ffs-fuse/lib.rs: add debug eprintln for FUSE fallocate mode bits
- ffs-harness/fuse_e2e.rs: use inline format args (clippy style), set
  mvcc_wal_path for read-write FUSE mount tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ toml = "0.8"
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.19"
 xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
-fuser = "0.16.0"
+fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
 zstd = "0.13"
 brotli = "6.0"
 flate2 = "1.0"

@@ -142,7 +142,7 @@ fn create_test_image_with_size(dir: &Path, image_size_bytes: u64) -> std::path::
         .args([
             "-w",
             "-R",
-            &format!("set_inode_field hello.txt uid {}", uid),
+            &format!("set_inode_field hello.txt uid {uid}"),
             image.to_str().unwrap(),
         ])
         .output()
@@ -152,7 +152,7 @@ fn create_test_image_with_size(dir: &Path, image_size_bytes: u64) -> std::path::
         .args([
             "-w",
             "-R",
-            &format!("set_inode_field hello.txt gid {}", gid),
+            &format!("set_inode_field hello.txt gid {gid}"),
             image.to_str().unwrap(),
         ])
         .output()
@@ -414,6 +414,7 @@ fn try_mount_ffs_rw(image: &Path, mountpoint: &Path) -> Option<fuser::Background
     let opts = OpenOptions {
         skip_validation: false,
         ext4_journal_replay_mode: Ext4JournalReplayMode::SimulateOverlay,
+        mvcc_wal_path: Some(image.with_extension("wal")),
         ..OpenOptions::default()
     };
     let mut fs = OpenFs::open_with_options(&cx, image, &opts).expect("open ext4 image");
